trans-unit.source: Percentage of pages with approved staff lines / layout / symbols / text & syllables
trans-unit.target: Percentage of pages with approved staff lines / layout / symbols / text & syllables

trans-unit.source: Drag ZIP here or click to browse
trans-unit.target: Drag ZIP here or click to browse

trans-unit.source: Loading the documents of the book failed.
trans-unit.target: Loading the documents of the book failed.

trans-unit.source: No documents listed yet. Start by annotating lyric regions as a document start
trans-unit.target: No documents listed yet. Start by annotating lyric regions as a document start

trans-unit.source: Download Monodi Meta File for all Documents
trans-unit.target: Download Monodi Meta File for all Documents

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file containing one Monodi Plus json file per document (chant). All positional annotations are removed, only musical relevant information is preserved, i. e. music lines comprising syllables and the corresponding neumes, and accompanying texts.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file containing one Monodi Plus json file per document (chant). All positional annotations are removed, only musical relevant information is preserved, i. e. music lines comprising syllables and the corresponding neumes, and accompanying texts.

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file containing the annotations in mei4 format. For each document (chant) a directory is created that contains the mei files of its pages.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file containing the annotations in mei4 format. For each document (chant) a directory is created that contains the mei files of its pages.

trans-unit.source: Used as default by the staff line detection
trans-unit.target: Used as default by the staff line detection

trans-unit.source: Once you delete a book, there is no going back. Please be certain.
trans-unit.target: Once you delete a book, there is no going back. Please be certain.

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete all files associated with book ?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to delete all files associated with book ?

trans-unit.source: Configure the steps that are run one after another
trans-unit.target: Configure the steps that are run one after another

trans-unit.source: Care, this will include also data from other books that might be written in a different notation
trans-unit.target: Care, this will include also data from other books that might be written in a different notation

trans-unit.source: Trains an additional prediction head for note types (liquescent, oriscus, apostropha). All selected pages must be fully annotated with note types.
trans-unit.target: Trains an additional prediction head for note types (liquescent, oriscus, apostropha). All selected pages must be fully annotated with note types.

trans-unit.source: Enable training of additional symbol types
trans-unit.target: Enable training of additional symbol types

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to clean all files associated with book ? Only the original files will remain. This can not be undone!
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to clean all files associated with book ? Only the original files will remain. This can not be undone!

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete page of book . This includes all images and annotations.
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to delete page of book . This includes all images and annotations.

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete pages of book . This includes all images and annotations.
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to delete pages of book . This includes all images and annotations.

trans-unit.source: Warning: This can not be undone!
trans-unit.target: Warning: This can not be undone!

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file that contains all selected images.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file that contains all selected images.

trans-unit.source: This will export a json file that can be uploaded to Monodi Plus. All positional annotations are removed, only musical relevant information is preserved, i. e. music lines comprising syllables and the corresponding neumes, and accompanying texts.
trans-unit.target: This will export a json file that can be uploaded to Monodi Plus. All positional annotations are removed, only musical relevant information is preserved, i. e. music lines comprising syllables and the corresponding neumes, and accompanying texts.

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file containing the full annotations and the corresponding original images grouped by types, i.e. one directory will contain all pcgts, other directories exist for deskewed color or grayscale.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file containing the full annotations and the corresponding original images grouped by types, i.e. one directory will contain all pcgts, other directories exist for deskewed color or grayscale.

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file containing the full annotations ordered page wise. The pcgts, statistics, page progress, and solely the original image are exported since all other images can be computed again.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file containing the full annotations ordered page wise. The pcgts, statistics, page progress, and solely the original image are exported since all other images can be computed again.

trans-unit.source: This will export a zip file containing the annotations in mei4 format.
trans-unit.target: This will export a zip file containing the annotations in mei4 format.

trans-unit.source: Please enter a valid name (Characters, digits or underscore).
trans-unit.target: Please enter a valid name (Characters, digits or underscore).

trans-unit.source: Providers are enabled on the server via environment variables (GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_URL)
trans-unit.target: Providers are enabled on the server via environment variables (GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_URL)

trans-unit.source: Paste the text you want to insert
trans-unit.target: Paste the text you want to insert

trans-unit.source: This text will be applied to the text lines, respectively
trans-unit.target: This text will be applied to the text lines, respectively

trans-unit.source:
This page is currently edited by
. Do you want to withdraw the permissions?
trans-unit.target:
This page is currently edited by
. Do you want to withdraw the permissions?

trans-unit.source: Unchecked buttons are moved into the section's overflow menu.
trans-unit.target: Unchecked buttons are moved into the section's overflow menu.

trans-unit.source: Mark if this line does not exist (e.g. missing) in the original manuscript and was reconstructed through other sources instead
trans-unit.target: Mark if this line does not exist (e.g. missing) in the original manuscript and was reconstructed through other sources instead

trans-unit.source: Mark the line as a document start
trans-unit.target: Mark the line as a document start

trans-unit.source: Run the automatic staff line detection
trans-unit.target: Run the automatic staff line detection

trans-unit.source: Create, edit, or delete single staff lines
trans-unit.target: Create, edit, or delete single staff lines

trans-unit.source: Group single staff lines into staffs
trans-unit.target: Group single staff lines into staffs

trans-unit.source: Mark the staff line editing progress as finished
trans-unit.target: Mark the staff line editing progress as finished

trans-unit.source: Create, edit or delete the layout
trans-unit.target: Create, edit or delete the layout

trans-unit.source: Extract a region based on connected components
trans-unit.target: Extract a region based on connected components

trans-unit.source: Draw a lasso to create or extend a region
trans-unit.target: Draw a lasso to create or extend a region

trans-unit.source: Split text lines in a region
trans-unit.target: Split text lines in a region

trans-unit.source: Add, move or delete logical connections
trans-unit.target: Add, move or delete logical connections

trans-unit.source: Go back to the page selection
trans-unit.target: Go back to the page selection

trans-unit.source: Open the cheat sheet also by pressing Shift + ? on the keyboard. Depending on the selected editor tool a different cheat sheet is displayed.
trans-unit.target: Open the cheat sheet also by pressing Shift + ? on the keyboard. Depending on the selected editor tool a different cheat sheet is displayed.

trans-unit.source: Mark the staff line editing progress as finished.
trans-unit.target: Mark the staff line editing progress as finished.

trans-unit.source: Run the end-to-end transcription (symbols, lyrics and syllables in one step, experimental)
trans-unit.target: Run the end-to-end transcription (symbols, lyrics and syllables in one step, experimental)

trans-unit.source: Reduce the number of neumes to match the number of syllables
trans-unit.target: Reduce the number of neumes to match the number of syllables

trans-unit.source: This page is generated. Adjust to your needs!
trans-unit.target: This page is generated. Adjust to your needs!

trans-unit.source: Export all pages with pattern matches as a printable PDF
trans-unit.target: Export all pages with pattern matches as a printable PDF

trans-unit.source: No patterns found for the current search.
trans-unit.target: No patterns found for the current search.
